nodes.name: MarkdownBody.tsx
nodes.summary: Rich markdown rendering component with support for mermaid diagrams, wiki-links, issue reference links, code blocks with copy, and mention chips. Acts as the primary read-only markdown display layer used throughout the application.

nodes.name: MarkdownBody
nodes.summary: Main exported React component that renders markdown content with configurable features including wiki-links, issue references, image handling, and custom remark plugins.

nodes.name: CodeBlock
nodes.summary: Renders a fenced code block with syntax highlighting and a clipboard copy button, with fallback for browsers lacking clipboard API.

nodes.name: MermaidDiagramBlock
nodes.summary: Lazily loads the Mermaid library and renders diagram SVG from source, adapting theme to dark/light mode.

nodes.name: MarkdownEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Full-featured rich markdown editor component with @mention autocomplete, keyboard-driven mention menu positioning, paste normalization, and caret management utilities exported for use by other components.

nodes.name: MarkdownEditor
nodes.summary: Primary exported editor component supporting markdown authoring with rich text, @mention autocomplete, image uploads, keyboard shortcuts, and paste handling.

nodes.name: findMentionMatch
nodes.summary: Exported utility that scans text to detect an active @mention trigger at the given caret offset, returning the match details for the autocomplete menu.

nodes.name: computeMentionMenuPosition
nodes.summary: Exported utility that calculates the floating mention menu position relative to the caret anchor and viewport bounds.

nodes.name: findClosestAutocompleteAnchor
nodes.summary: Exported utility that locates the nearest existing mention anchor element in the editor DOM closest to the cursor origin point.

nodes.name: MetricCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Simple presentational card component for displaying a metric with an icon, numeric value, label, description, and optional navigation link.

nodes.name: MobileBottomNav.tsx
nodes.summary: Mobile-specific bottom navigation bar that renders primary app navigation links, an inbox badge counter, and a new-issue trigger.

nodes.name: MobileBottomNav
nodes.summary: Exported React component rendering mobile bottom navigation with active route highlighting and inbox badge.

nodes.name: NewAgentDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog component for creating a new agent, presenting available adapter types in a visual grid and allowing navigation to the adapter configuration page.

nodes.name: NewAgentDialog
nodes.summary: Exported dialog component that lists available agent adapter types, filters disabled ones, and navigates to the creation page on selection.

nodes.name: NewGoalDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog for creating a new organizational goal with title, description, status, level, and optional parent goal selection.

nodes.name: NewGoalDialog
nodes.summary: Exported dialog component with form state management for creating goals, including goal hierarchy and asset image upload.

nodes.name: NewIssueDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: The most complex dialog in the application, handling new issue creation with full support for project selection, agent assignment, execution workspace modes, draft persistence, document file staging, priority, and markdown description.

nodes.name: NewIssueDialog
nodes.summary: Exported component that implements the full new-issue creation flow with draft save/restore, file attachments, agent and workspace selection, and submission mutation.

nodes.name: NewProjectDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog for creating a new project with name, description, status, goals association, and optional agent / path instructions configuration.

nodes.name: NewProjectDialog
nodes.summary: Exported dialog component for project creation with form fields, member access control, and path instructions configuration.

nodes.name: OnboardingWizard.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-step onboarding wizard that guides new users through company setup, adapter configuration, goal creation, and first issue creation with ASCII art animations.

nodes.name: OnboardingWizard
nodes.summary: Exported multi-step wizard orchestrating the full onboarding flow with adapter selection, approval setup, goal creation, and first issue submission.

nodes.name: OpenCodeLogoIcon.tsx
nodes.summary: Simple SVG logo icon component for the OpenCode adapter, used in adapter picker and agent configuration UI.

nodes.name: OutputFeedbackButtons.tsx
nodes.summary: Component rendering thumbs-up/thumbs-down feedback buttons for agent output, persisting feedback state and submitting to the API.

nodes.name: OutputFeedbackButtons
nodes.summary: Exported component that shows feedback controls with optimistic state, submission mutation, and optional comment collection.

nodes.name: PackageFileTree.tsx
nodes.summary: Thin re-export barrel that exposes the FileTree component and all its associated types and utilities under a single import path.

nodes.name: PageSkeleton.tsx
nodes.summary: Loading skeleton component that renders a full-page placeholder with header and content shimmer blocks while data is being fetched.

nodes.name: PageTabBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Horizontal tab bar component for page-level navigation that integrates with the sidebar context to adjust its positioning.

nodes.name: PathInstructionsModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal and button components that display platform-specific instructions for configuring repository path settings for agent execution environments.

nodes.name: PriorityIcon.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a colored icon representing an issue priority level, mapping priority values to status colors and SVG icons.

nodes.name: ProductivityReviewBadge.tsx
nodes.summary: Badge component that displays a productivity review trigger label with a tooltip and links to the relevant issue detail page.

nodes.name: ProjectProperties.tsx
nodes.summary: Comprehensive project settings panel that allows editing of project name, description, status, agent configuration, environment variables, secrets, and archive/danger-zone actions.

nodes.name: ProjectProperties
nodes.summary: Exported main component orchestrating all project property editing sub-panels, mutation handlers, and auto-save indicator.

nodes.name: ProjectWorkspacesContent.tsx
nodes.summary: Tab content component displaying the list of execution workspaces for a project with close/delete actions.

nodes.name: ProjectWorkspaceSummaryCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Card component summarizing an execution workspace, showing workspace kind, path, associated issues, and relative creation time.

nodes.name: ProjectWorkspaceSummaryCard
nodes.summary: Exported card component rendering workspace metadata, issue quicklook, and copy-text controls for workspace path.

nodes.name: PropertiesPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper component that conditionally renders a sliding properties panel based on context, deferring panel open/close state to PanelContext.

nodes.name: ProviderQuotaCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Card component that displays LLM provider quota usage with subscription panels for Claude and Codex, rendering a usage bar and skeleton loading state.

nodes.name: ProviderQuotaCard
nodes.summary: Exported component rendering provider quota overview with active subscription details and usage breakdown.

nodes.name: QuotaBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Simple progress-bar component for visualizing quota utilization, coloring the fill based on consumption thresholds.

nodes.name: ReportsToPicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown picker component for selecting the reporting-to agent in agent configuration, displaying agent icons and names.

nodes.name: ResizableSidebarPane.tsx
nodes.summary: Sidebar pane component that supports drag-to-resize with persisted width stored in localStorage, clamped to min/max bounds.

nodes.name: ResizableSidebarPane
nodes.summary: Exported component implementing a resizable sidebar pane with mouse-drag resize handle, persisting width to localStorage.
